dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: Echo, something bad's about to happen...You need to save Darry.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: Move objects in the house around to block the enemy and make a path Darry can use to escape.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: If the enemy reaches Darry, it'll harm him and consume some of your Astral Health. Do your best to make sure Darry escapes in one piece.
